name: Cory Booker
subject: hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Friend,
I'm sending along a final update today on our path to $1.7 million by September 30th.
My team told me we're only $9,275.42 away. **We 're so close and I could use your help getting us over the finish line.**
I was on CNN with Jake Tapper this morning and as we talked about our progress to goal, he asked me, **"might this be the second-to-last day of your campaign?"**
That question has been lingering with me all day -- and to be honest, I don't know the answer. As I said when we announced this goal, I don't want to stay in this race unless we have the resources to win -- and this still holds true.
As encouraged as I am by the groundswell of support we've seen over the past nine days, I don't want to take anything for granted. Things may be looking good right now -- but we need to keep stepping up during these final 24 hours to make it absolutely certain that we hit this end-of-quarter goal.
**Whether we have a viable path forward depends on how the members of this community step up at this very moment. Before you close out of your email tonight, can I count on you to help push us over the top?**
**Here 's a link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190929_CB_20190929-fr-CB-finalupdate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Hoping I'll be able to write to you with good news tomorrow.
Cory
| Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b84/5fca0d19/77bcf070/291f1eac/2510565765/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b84/5fca0d19/77bcf070/291f1eab/2510565765/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b84/5fca0d19/77bcf070/291f1eaa/2510565765/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b84/5fca0d19/77bcf070/291f1ea9/2510565765/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b84/5fca0d19/77bcf070/291f1ea8/2510565765/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b84/5fca0d19/77bcf070/291f1eac/2510565765/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Liz Robertson
subject: The last month of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Will you donate now so we can make the most of the next 37 days and elect Andy governor of Kentucky?
|
---

| | | **Days till Election: 37
September fundraising goal: $35,000
Still need to raise: $23,922
Days till fundraising deadline: 1**

| [**Donate Now**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a45/ad6dc73/140fa47e/db7bc2e/3271650935/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septeom?refcode=20190929.2nd__293__&amount=5")

Peter --

If you've been getting more emails than usual from political campaigns, there's a reason: there's a big September 30th fundraising deadline and campaigns are scrambling to meet their goals.

But while most campaigns are still more than a year out from Election Day, **we 're only 37 DAYS away! And with almost $35,000 to raise by tomorrow, it doesn't get much more urgent than this.**

The great news is that a generous group of supporters will **MATCH ALL DONATIONS** that come in by **midnight tomorrow.** So right now your donation will be worth _twice as much!_

**Will you donate now so we can make the most of the next 37 days and elect Andy governor of Kentucky?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a45/ad6dc73/140fa47e/db7bc2f/3271650935/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20190929.2nd__293__&amount=5")**

Look, this election is going to be _close._ Matt Bevin may be a terrible governor, but he's got deep pockets and special interests who want to keep him in office.

If we're going to get rid of Bevin and his corrupt ways, **we need your help RIGHT NOW to make these next 37 days count** and get every voter who's ready to move Kentucky forward to the polls.

**[Please chip in now if you can, so that your donation will be matched when we need it most.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a45/ad6dc73/140fa47e/db7bc2e/3271650935/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septeom?refcode=20190929.2nd__293__&amount=5")**

Liz

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Personal note from me after my weekend in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I think we're going to need bigger venues.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1145%2E377263%2EJM_sTt) **36 hours before our FEC Deadline
Amount left to hit our goal: $195,277** | [Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12127?t=5&akid=1145%2E377263%2EJM_sTt)
---
Hello and thank you for your support. We've got a big Q3 deadline on Monday night and we are on track to hit our goal, but we can’t relax until the quarter ends!

I’m writing this after a couple days campaigning in New Hampshire -- and the takeaway is we’re going to need bigger venues.

I’ve been visiting New Hampshire since early last year, and things have changed a lot since then. On Thursday night in Peterborough, we drew an overflow crowd which resulted in people getting turned away at the door:
We had an enormous group of hundreds at UNH, and then we were over capacity in Nashua.
Everywhere we went there were familiar faces and new ones. One thing I love about New Hampshire is that voters come see you speak multiple times and bring new friends each time. It’s very human -- it’s national politics as a town campfire.

Among the things I heard from voters:

“I’m a Trump voter that’s now voting for you.”

“You’re the only candidate I’m excited about. I’m telling all of my friends.”

“I saw you speak at the convention in Manchester, and you were the best candidate of all 19. I was falling asleep until you got up there.”

A recent poll had me beating Donald Trump head-to-head in New Hampshire by 8 points. The same poll had Elizabeth Warren losing by 2 points.

Our team is growing in New Hampshire too -- we are adding new staffers regularly and should double within the next month. We've opened several new offices, too.

One thing I enjoy about New Hampshire is that getting there is a pleasant drive through the beautiful countryside. If you are looking to make a difference for the campaign, phone banking or even canvassing in New Hampshire is a great way to go -- if you convince one voter in New Hampshire, you’ll feel a deep sense of accomplishment. It's a phenomenal feeling.

The people of New Hampshire will make their voice heard next February. I will be back soon. And next time, we’ll book the biggest venues we can find. I have the feeling that we’ll need them.

Let’s finish this quarter strong!

-Andrew

P.S. **[If you can pitch in before our deadline it would be a huge help. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12127?t=7&akid=1145%2E377263%2EJM_sTt) **
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is Monday, September 30 at 11:59PM and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12127?t=6&akid=1145%2E377263%2EJM_sTt)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=1145%2E377263%2EJM_sTt) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1145%2E377263%2EJM_sTt) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Bringing people together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

This campaign is about bringing this divided country together so that we
can meet the greatest challenges America has ever faced. And we’re doing
it by going everywhere and showing up for everyone.

Just on this trip, we spent time in Aurora and Chicago, meeting with
survivors of gun violence to focus on steps to reduce gun deaths in this
country; we joined thousands in the streets of Denver in a climate strike
to focus our attention on confronting climate change before it is too
late; we spent time in Gary, Indiana listening to a community that wants
to contribute to the national conversation on jobs and economic
opportunity. And we spoke to nearly 12,000 people at the annual Steak Fry
in Iowa, getting a chance to reach those who will decide the
first-in-the-nation caucus, most of whom are still undecided.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/36519?refcode=ema20190929-58234&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=58234%2E444211%2Ec_1YQz ]Your donations make this possible, and tomorrow we have a deadline and
a $750k goal. Can you make a contribution now so we can meet our goal?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/36519?refcode=ema20190929-58234&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=58234%2E444211%2Ec_1YQz ]Contribute $3

Your willingness to contribute to this campaign gives me the chance to
travel to these communities and meet with our fellow Americans. It allows
us to run a campaign that is fearless in standing up for the right thing
and tireless in bringing in people from all parts of the country and every
walk of life.

On this same trip we’ve also been to:

* Skid Row, to meet with homeless women and men to listen to their ideas
and solutions for housing and economic justice
* A cannabis dispensary in Oakland to learn how transformative justice
must be central to ending the prohibition on marijuana and addressing
a war on drugs that has become a war on communities of color
* A dry dock in Erie, Pennsylvania, to focus on creating more
manufacturing jobs in America
* Kent State, to hear about how student leadership was fundamental to
ending the war in Vietnam, and is essential to meeting the challenges
we face today
* Dayton, Ohio to learn from that community’s experience with mass
shootings and gun violence
* The Meskwaki settlement in Iowa to listen to Native American women as
they describe the challenges and solutions to environmental and
criminal justice concerns
* A community roundtable in Lordstown, Ohio to understand the
devastation of the GM plant closure there and the need to support
unions and workers
* A town hall in Pittsburgh, to discuss the cost and consequences of
rising anti-semitism and hate crimes in America

Check out the photos at the end of the email. While we had the chance to
listen and learn at every stop, I also had the chance to make my case for
the nomination and enlist the support of prospective voters and
volunteers. We shared with them our ability to win Texas and its 38
electoral college votes; our commitment to campaigning without PAC money
or corporate help; and our success in bringing in new Democratic voters as
well as gaining support from Independents and even Republicans who no
longer feel welcomed in the party of Donald Trump.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/36519?refcode=ema20190929-58234&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=58234%2E444211%2Ec_1YQz ]Please contribute now to help us reach our goal before tomorrow’s
deadline. Help me stay on the road so that we can continue to bring our
fellow Americans into the most important election of our lifetime. I
promise to make the most of your contributions and to stay on the road for
as long as it takes, to work as hard as we possibly can, and to be there
for everyone, every day.

Thank you,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/36519?refcode=ema20190929-58234&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=58234%2E444211%2Ec_1YQz ]Contribute

Skid Row

Kent State

Dayton

The Meskwaki settlement

Lordstown

Pittsburgh

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190929footer&t=1023&refcode2=58234_444211_c_1YQz&akid=58234%2E444211%2Ec_1YQz

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=58234%2E444211%2Ec_1YQz

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

Thank you, Beto [ ]Contribute Skid Row Kent State Dayton The Meskwaki settlement Lordstown Pittsburgh Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: Warren HQ
subject: What falling short would mean
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
If we come up short on our fundraising goal this quarter, it means we'll face long consequences in the future. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529bce/45c30650/10b875b19/668f2914/1490928256/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Here's the thing:

If we come up short on our fundraising goal this quarter, it means we'll face long consequences in the future. That's why hitting this end-of-quarter goal is so important, and why we're asking you to make your first contribution before tomorrow's midnight deadline.

We know that we'll win this election if we keep building our movement on the ground -- by hiring more organizers, knocking on more doors, and sharing more face-to-face conversations with voters.

We need to be making those critical organizing investments **right now** -- and our campaign's budget is powered by grassroots donations to emails just like this one.

**But our numbers are still coming up a little short right now, and whether or not we hit this goal will determine if we can make those critical investments.**

[**Please chip in $3 before the midnight deadline tomorrow. Your donation will help hit this critical fundraising goal and will translate to real impact in growing our movement on the ground.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529bce/45c30650/10b875b19/668f2917/1490928256/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMVdGX0VPUV9TSE9fUV8yMDE5MDkyOV9WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1WF_EOQ_SHO_Q_20190929_V1S2_P_T2")

name: Team Durbin
subject: This deadline is a huge test
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter, did you see Senator Durbin's message earlier today?
Meeting our fundraising goal before the FEC deadline is a huge test for our campaign. We need to finish the quarter strong to show President Trump and the Republicans that we're ready to fight back in 2020--and win.
[**Pitch in $5 right now to help Senator Durbin meet his end-of-quarter goal before the deadline.**](http://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-sept-2019?refcode=em190929pm&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-sept-2019?refcode=em190929pm&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
\---Original Message from Senator Dick Durbin---
Peter,
It seemed like every hour this week another news story broke that demonstrated exactly why we need to not only defeat President Trump, but take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell in 2020.
With a Democratic Senate, we'll finally overcome the corruption and obstruction that are hallmarks of the Trump Administration and the Republican Party. But if we come up short, our hands will be tied while the GOP endangers our democracy and threatens our future.
**[There's no path to a Senate majority if we don't win right here in Illinois. I'm up against a huge FEC deadline and need you to show your support for my campaign now more than ever. Can you contribute $5 now to help me meet my fundraising goal?](http://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-sept-2019?refcode=em190929pm&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I can promise you this--this won't be the last week when President Trump's corrupt behavior tests our institutions or undermines our values.
But if we keep on track with our goals, victory is within our reach next year. We can take back the White House and elect a Democratic Senate majority, but we can only do it if we stand together and show Republicans that we're ready for the fight of our lives.
**[Peter, can I count on you to contribute $5 before the urgent FEC end-of-quarter deadline?](http://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-sept-2019?refcode=em190929pm&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-sept-2019?refcode=em190929pm&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c71/42ab3cf4/618eca7a/135d4635/3696378614/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c71/42ab3cf4/618eca7a/135d4636/3696378614/VEsB/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Tina Smith
subject: I'll be quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I was just looking at our progress before this end-of-quarter deadline, and the simple truth is that we need to keep pushing. We've got $39,520 left to go before tomorrow's midnight deadline, can you

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929eoq5-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

I don't want to take up too much of your time, but this deadline is important.

My finance team and I just went over the progress on our end-of-quarter goal before tomorrow's midnight deadline. And I hate to say it, but we've got to keep pushing forward to make our goal.

With Jason Lewis in this race and Trump coming to Minnesota at the beginning of October, this end-of-quarter deadline is how we are going to prove that our campaign is ready to take on whatever the Republicans throw at us.

Your support in these next few hours is more than just comparing numbers. It proves that we won't let the GOP turn Minnesota red, that we are coming together on this common goal, and we will not back down. And we're just $39,520 away from proving this point.

**[So before midnight tomorrow, can you help prove to Republicans that we won't stand idle in this race?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929eoq5-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thanks for everything that you do,

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929eoq5-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

| | Our September grassroots fundraising deadline is tomorrow night, just hours away, and we have $18,892 to go to smash through our goal. **[Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and their right-wing allies are conspiring to protect their corruption in Washington DC. I need your help right now to make sure we take back the Senate and stop these outrages. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Let's just all zoom out for a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Winning this race will go a long way toward deciding who controls the Senate--we already know that the other side will line up millions in dark money to do whatever they can to hold on to Cory Gardner | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714a8/691c9bd/6e2417d7/11a7a7c1/3429666064/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend--

I'm going to ask you to make a donation in a minute, but first I wanted to zoom out and tell you exactly why all this matters to me.

Tomorrow's FEC deadline isn't just about the numbers we put up. Our report will give everybody watching our campaign a first look at _how_ we're building this and _who_ is part of it. And there's a lot on the line.

**Winning this race will go a long way toward deciding who controls the Senate** --and we already know that the other side will line up millions in dark money to do whatever they can to hold on to Cory Gardner's seat. We know they have a big head start in terms of money in the bank.

The truth is, we're not going to beat them at that game. The way we win is by building a grassroots operation capable of taking on the super PACs and special interests--and that happens one person at a time.

Our FEC report is the official record of the people who showed up to get this campaign off the ground. So I'm asking personally: [**_Will you chip in before tomorrow 's deadline and be one of our campaign's founding donors?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190929_JH_20190929-fr-JH-bigpic-all_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190929_JH_20190929-fr-JH-bigpic-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714a8/691c9bd/6e2417d7/11a7a7fd/3429666064/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714a8/691c9bd/6e2417d7/11a7a7fa/3429666064/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714a8/691c9bd/6e2417d7/11a7a7fb/3429666064/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714a8/691c9bd/6e2417d7/11a7a7f8/3429666064/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714a8/691c9bd/6e2417d7/11a7a7f9/3429666064/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714a8/691c9bd/6e2417d7/11a7a7f6/3429666064/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714a8/691c9bd/6e2417d7/11a7a7fd/3429666064/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

Peter,
We are cutting it close – we have until midnight tonight to reach our September goal.
Our state is suffering because of the corrupt politics in Washington. Tennesseans want a better future for their kids, not a trade war with China.
If we can raise another $4,855 by midnight, we will have the funds to continue recruiting and training candidates who share our values and want to work for the good of every Tennessean . It shouldn't matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, how you pray or who you love. Will you pitch in what you can right now and help us reach our goal?

name: Lipinski HQ
subject: re: Judy’s email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list
body:
http://lipinskiforcongress.com/ [http://lipinskiforcongress.com/]
Our FEC deadline hits at midnight TONIGHT, Peter. We saw that Judy sent you an email, so we wanted to check in and make sure you saw it.
As of right now, we are $1,978 away from our goal. Can we count on you to chip in before midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-fec-sept19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190930_1_6&amount=15&recurring=true]
Begin forwarded message from Judy Lipinski:
Peter, I was talking with Dan over the weekend, and he told me about his crucial FEC deadline. He tells me we’re only $4,984 away from reaching our goal!
This deadline is incredibly essential to Dan’s campaign. Dan’s been working hard to find commonsense solutions to the problems that Illinoisans face, and I see how hard he works every day.
Recently, Dan has been attacked by extremists on both sides of the political spectrum — so we need your support now more than ever.
Can you rush 15 by midnight? Any amount will help us fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-fec-sept19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190930_1_6&amount=15&recurring=true]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below.
Donate $15 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-fec-sept19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190930_1_6&amount=15&express_lane=true]Donate $25 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-fec-sept19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190930_1_6&amount=25&express_lane=true]
Donate $50 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-fec-sept19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190930_1_6&amount=50&express_lane=true]Donate Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-fec-sept19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190930_1_6&amount=15&recurring=true]
We both hate asking for money, but this deadline is truly the most important one we've faced yet. Anything you can contribute would help our campaign immeasurably.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-fec-sept19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190930_1_6&amount=15&recurring=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-fec-sept19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190930_1_6&amount=15&recurring=true]
Thank you again,
Judy
Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to like Dan on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/danlipinskiforcongress/] or follow Dan on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DanLipinski] . If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can click here to support Dan’s reelection now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-general?refcode=footer&amount=20&recurring=auto]

Hey,

I'll keep this short, as today is the final day of our campaign's first fundraising quarter.

Our team at HQ is still working to close our $8,936 fundraising gap before tonight's midnight FEC filing deadline.

Even still, I was thrilled to take this job and join Team Sri because I know **Sri has what it takes to win this thing and then go fight for Texas families in Washington!** **Right now, I need your help to hit this deadline and maybe even impress my new boss by blowing past our fundraising goal!** Here's the simple truth: Our fundraising numbers will be made public, and the only way to prove to pundits, the media, and our opponents that we're serious (and out to win!) is to post stellar numbers. name: Mike Franken
subject: Listen, this is why tonight's deadline means everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I need your help to win, and there are only hours until midnight. Can I count on your support today?
|
---

| | Friends, It's hard to believe, given the whirlwind of the last few days, that we are but a few hours away from the campaign's first filing deadline. My team is going nonstop until we hit our goal. And I'll be calling the last ten donors to personally thank them for putting us over the top. [**Can you donate now?**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f246e/33365068/4a66bc08/3f8bb588/3020777297/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190930_AM_fr_em") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $5 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f246e/33365068/4a66bc08/3f8bb589/3020777297/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20190930_am_fr_em_express_lane_5")
---
[Donate $10 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f246e/33365068/4a66bc08/3f8bb58a/3020777297/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20190930_am_fr_em_express_lane_10")
---
[Donate $25 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f246e/33365068/4a66bc08/3f8bb58b/3020777297/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20190930_am_fr_em_express_lane_25")
---
[Other Amount](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f246e/33365068/4a66bc08/3f8bb584/3020777297/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190930_am_fr_em_express_lane_other")
---
Over the last several days, you've heard a bit from me regarding inappropriate conversations our President had with foreign leaders. All of this is deeply worrisome and doubly. Folks, this isn't supposed to be happening in America.
I entered this race because I saw the nation getting tugged apart. Initially, I thought the tussle would entail removing inequalities, and inequities so everyone had an equal chance to climb the ladder of success for generations to come. I now see an effort to renew some basic precepts of probity, some salvation to basic democratic principles, and some semblance of service for the benefit of all. Again folks, this isn't supposed to be happening in America.
Folks, I will not be a stooge to special interests; I will maintain dignity in the office; and I will sponsor plans for comprehensive health care for all, measures to address the climate crisis, and restrictions to ensure Wall Street greed doesn't remove the ladder to success for some. Farmers, rest assured, I hear you.
[**I need your help to win, and there are only hours until our midnight fundraising deadline. Can I count on your support today?**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f246e/33365068/4a66bc08/3f8bb588/3020777297/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190930_AM_fr_em")
Thank you so much for being a part of this campaign,
Mike
|
---

---

body:

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: DEMO MEMO: GOP HATE, VOTER SUPPRESSION , & WASTEFUL SPENDING
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
From hate toward anti-bully advocates and the LGBTQ community, to wasteful spending of taxpayer dollars and SOS Mac Warner STILL denying automatic voter registration three years since the bill passed, the WVGOP has had a busy week of self-serving corruption in West Virginia.
Oh yeah, and Patrick Morrisey is begging West Virginians for money to pay his old campaign debt.
**We can't make this stuff up. Take a look for yourself: **
\- GOP Delegate Joe Jeffries attacks Hurricane High School teacher on social media for hanging up an anti-bullying display in the classroom. name: Cory Booker
subject: Last night at 8:16 p.m.

body:
| | |
---
| I have some incredible news, friend. **Last night at 8:16 p.m., we reached our goal of $1.7 million -- a full day ahead of the deadline we set for ourselves.** I'm so grateful that at the most critical moment of this campaign, tens of thousands of people in all fifty states came together to give us the boost we needed. You put us back on a trajectory where we know we can be competitive. There's a viable path forward, so I'm staying in this race because I know we can win it. We honestly could not have predicted we'd get to $1.7 million so quickly, and we've still got nearly a full day left of the fundraising quarter. After midnight tonight, our campaign will have to file a report with the FEC that shows how much we've raised over the last three months. Everyone will look to our report as a measure of our strength. I'm blown away by the strength we've already shown by raising $1.7 million over the last nine days -- [**and I bet we can finish even stronger by raising $216,495, for a total of $2 million, before midnight tonight.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190930_CB_20190930-fr-CB-2million-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **If you haven 't given yet, there's still time. Will you keep the momentum going by chipping in to help us reach $2 million before the end-of-quarter deadline at 11:59 p.m. tonight?** | If you've saved your payment information with
ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190930_CB_20190930-fr-CB-2million-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20.20,50,100")

| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190930_CB_20190930-fr-CB-2million-actives_actives_express100&amount=100&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20.20,50,100")

| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190930_CB_20190930-fr-CB-2million-actives_actives_expressother&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20.20,50,100")
---

Raising $1.7 million was by no means an easy venture. Frankly, after we set this goal last week, I did not know what to expect. But what happened was this:
* We received donations from all fifty states, plus D.C. and Puerto Rico.
* We received 40,625 contributions from people who stepped up to say that they believe our campaign deserves to stay in the race.
* We raised $1,783,504.44 in just nine days.
* **We 're on track to have the best quarter of our entire campaign but the books close tonight at 11:59 p.m.**

**[You haven't stepped up yet and now is the time to do so. Chip in whatever you can right now and make sure we have the best quarter our campaign has ever seen.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190930_CB_20190930-fr-CB-2million-actives_ndnrs_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
$1.7 million wasn't just a goal. It was the real number we knew was necessary for us to continue building an organization that can take us all the way to the White House. We have what we need to continue and grow. But let's not stop now. Let's keep the momentum going.
Thank you so, so much,
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190930_CB_20190930-fr-CB-2million-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

_P.S. Here 's the moment Team Cory realized we hit $1.7 million. Had to share:_
__

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b87/5fca0d19/77a7d137/291f185d/951353516/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b87/5fca0d19/77a7d137/291f185c/951353516/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b87/5fca0d19/77a7d137/291f185b/951353516/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b87/5fca0d19/77a7d137/291f185a/951353516/VEsHAA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b87/5fca0d19/77a7d137/291f185e/951353516/VEsHAw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

This is the time to show Republicans just what we’re made of. Please chip in whatever you can. ( ) We appreciate all that you do! Thompson for Congress HQ Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. Consider making a donation of any amount now. ( ) We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails, click here. name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: I'm asking personally, friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Today is the most important moment of our campaign to date. Please add your donation, of whatever you can afford, before the FEC deadline.
|
---

| | Friends, Today's September 30 -- the final day of the quarter. So, here are a few things I want to let you know about tonight's public fundraising deadline:
* **It's the most important moment of our campaign to date.** Once this deadline is over, we have to publicly report what we raise.
* **There are a LOT of competitive House races in New Jersey right now.** We can't risk falling short of this goal and losing the attention of Democrats across New Jersey.
* **I really believe in our team.** If you chip in right now, we're going to succeed.

**[I'm asking personally: Can you please add your donation, of whatever you can afford, before tonight's FEC deadline? This is such an important moment for us.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0a9/522d4087/7afdffdf/4f3435d8/3308315284/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=20190930_em_am_nd")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[CHIP IN: $10](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0a9/522d4087/7afdffdf/4f3435d7/3308315284/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20190930_em_nd_am_abx_10")**
---
**[CHIP IN: $25](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0a9/522d4087/7afdffdf/4f3435d6/3308315284/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20190930_em_nd_am_abx_25")**
---
**[CHIP IN: $50](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0a9/522d4087/7afdffdf/4f3435d5/3308315284/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20190930_em_nd_am_abx_50")**
---
**[CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0a9/522d4087/7afdffdf/4f3435d4/3308315284/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=20190930_em_nd_am_abx_other")**
---
I'm running for congress because I believe that America is at its best when we open up our hearts. When we protect human rights, here and abroad. When we protect women, and girls, and our LGTBQ+ friends. When we live up to the promise of a more perfect union. When we stand up and defend our Constitution.
But politicians like Donald Trump and Chris Smith are different. They want to divide us rather than unite us. Their values simply don't align with the values that you and I share.
So that's why I'm asking for your help today. **I can promise you that I will fight every single day for you and for families across this district -- but to do it, we need to send that blue wave crashing down on the Jersey Shore.**
**[Can you please contribute what you can before midnight? Whatever you can give, I promise, it WILL make a difference.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0a9/522d4087/7afdffdf/4f3435d8/3308315284/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=20190930_em_am_nd")**
Thanks for standing with me.
\-- Stephanie
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0a9/522d4087/7afdffdf/4f3435d3/3308315284/VEsB/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe") at any time._

name: Sara Gideon
subject: We have another chance to prove our critics wrong.
body:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c68/4bef7a87/6b799e58/287f3904/1421637292/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
When I first launched my campaign just three months ago, people doubted that we could take on and defeat a 22-year incumbent like Susan Collins.
Now, _Cook Political Report_ ranks our race a "toss-up."
People doubted that a campaign funded by grassroots donations would be able to build up enough resources to stay competitive.
Then, we raised over a million dollars in our first week - all without taking a dime from corporate PACs.
**Tonight at midnight, we have yet another chance to prove our critics wrong.**
We're just a few hours away from a very important FEC deadline. After it hits, my team will have to publicly report not just how much we raised, but how many people supported this campaign with a donation.
All eyes are on us - so let's prove to everyone watching this race that yes, we can win:
[**Add one more $3 contribution before our FEC fundraising deadline tonight at midnight. I wouldn 't ask if this weren't truly important.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c68/4bef7a87/6b799e58/287f391b/1421637292/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MzAtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190930-1-a")
I want you to know, I don't take your support lightly. It's something I am working to earn every single day.
It means more to me than I can say that you are putting your time and dollars into our campaign. And I know that together, with a lot of hard work, we can win.
All my best,
_Sara_
**Today is your last day to make a donation before our FEC fundraising deadline. Please chip in before midnight -> **
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c68/4bef7a87/6b799e58/287f391b/1421637292/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MzAtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190930-1-a")**

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c68/4bef7a87/6b799e58/287f391a/1421637292/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c68/4bef7a87/6b799e58/287f3919/1421637292/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: unfortunately
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I asked.
Speaker Pelosi asked.
Khizr Khan asked.
James Carville asked.
Deb Haaland asked.
Ted Lieu asked.
Gabby Giffords asked.
Paul Begala asked.
Pramila Jayapal asked.
Now I'm asking again.

After my closest Democratic colleagues called you to action after Trump's despicable rally here in my home state, I hoped I would see a surge of support.

**But unfortunately, it's starting to look like I might not meet my end-of-quarter goal.**

I have until midnight tonight to meet my deadline. But you've never let me down before. Not once. I'm counting on you to pull through for me one more time. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
[ _**Suggested Support: $5 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
---
I won't sugarcoat this:

**President Trump's pledge to turn our state red is one of the most dangerous threats our Democrats have ever faced.**

I can't overstate how important your $5 is before tonight's deadline. Can I count on you?
| ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")******

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Thank you,

Ben Ray
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b48e/18e32a7f/5360c52e/7b0cb9c2/375664357/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b48e/18e32a7f/5360c52e/7b0cb9c3/375664357/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b48e/18e32a7f/5360c52e/7b0cb9c0/375664357/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

name: Josh Hawley
subject: It's easy to get sidetracked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Maybe you got sidetracked with family events (I know I do)Peter,

I know you’ve heard from my team a lot lately, so I wouldn’t be emailing you again if it weren’t this crucial. The end of quarter fundraising deadline is TONIGHT, and I noticed your name wasn’t on the list of donors.

Maybe you didn’t have your wallet on hand, maybe you got sidetracked with family events (I know I do), but at the end of the day I cannot afford to lose your support. I know that supporters like you will make all the difference, and I need to see your name on that list.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: There is something special happening in Iowa and New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Let me explain how this campaign started and where we are going.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1146%2E377263%2EdY1zwv) Hey Yang Gang --

I have to ask: [**Can you pitch in before midnight toward the biggest deadline this campaign has ever faced? We’re just $33,313 away from our goal and I know we can hit it if everyone reading this gives it all they have.**](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12172?t=5&akid=1146%2E377263%2EdY1zwv)

Now that you’ve pitched in, I want to share this:

There is something special happening in Iowa, New Hampshire, and every place we visit.

We saw it in Nashua and Peterborough this weekend. Overflow crowds, new members of the Yang Gang, and an energy that I can’t really put into words.

This is amazing! And when I think about where we’ve come from -- just me, a couple volunteers and staffers working out of an apartment in New York City with bold ideas and a whiteboard -- it honestly blows my mind.

We didn’t have endorsements, big donors, or PACs lined up with checks. We didn’t even have a Facebook page.

But as we spread our Humanity First message, shared how a basic income would change lives, and talked about how to fix our economy to work for us again instead of just corporate profits, we noticed something. **People across the country who have been beaten down by debt and despair are now waking up to the power they hold to take control of their life.**

We are doing this. Not me, not this campaign, but _us._ This movement is already changing lives and doing it in a way that’s historic.

Now, we’re about to enter the most important phase of this campaign. The hard work of organizing for votes that Senators, members of Congress, and other folks running have spent their entire adult lives doing.

We’re once again in the role of underdog. The scrappy campaign with bold ideas for how to win and change lives. And every plan we draw up to make the November and December debates, get our message out to voters, and hire a bunch of staff in the early states comes down to what we raise between now and midnight.

While we are doing much better than in the early days, we’re still well behind the fundraising totals of so-called "frontrunners." They are likely to raise in the tens of millions. And while we don’t have to match them dollar-for-dollar, we do have to raise enough to compete. That’s why I’m asking:

[**Can you give everything you can before midnight so we can hit our $1.5 million goal? Whether we fall short or blow this goal away is up to you.**](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12172?t=8&akid=1146%2E377263%2EdY1zwv) | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12172?t=7&akid=1146%2E377263%2EdY1zwv)
---

Thank you, Yang Gang. We couldn’t do it without you.

-Andrew **Our end-of-quarter deadline is Monday, September 30 at 11:59PM and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12172?t=6&akid=1146%2E377263%2EdY1zwv)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=1146%2E377263%2EdY1zwv) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1146%2E377263%2EdY1zwv) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY
[Privacy Policy](https://www.yang2020.com/privacy_policy?t=4&akid=1146%2E377263%2EdY1zwv)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Our goal this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Last month, we launched Fair Fight 2020. This month, we have a big goal and I need your help. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa512/34a064cc/18c6851c/70310ca/2847017309/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - We are in for a tough fight this year. But I believe in you, friend. I believe that together, we can accomplish amazing things and still do what many consider impossible. [**My team set an ambitious goal of 60,000 grassroots donations before tonight's end-of-quarter deadline, and I know that we can hit our goal with your help. Will you make your first donation to Fair Fight today and help us get there?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa512/34a064cc/18c6851c/70310cb/2847017309/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE093019SYA-eoq-3a") This goal isn't just about how much money we raise. This goal is about building a movement that is strong enough to ensure free and fair elections for all. When more of us join together - when people like you and me support movements for progress with our time, our treasure, and our talents - we win. We are doing the work to protect the right to vote, but we need to scale our work across the country right now. What happens next is up to us. The kind of country we live in will depend on how we collectively respond to voter suppression and attacks on our right to vote. And the truth is that attacks on our right to vote are not new. They are part of a system of disenfranchisement to silence those whose voices could change the trajectory of our nation to expand opportunity and allow more people to have a say in who we are and what we become. We can change the trajectory of this country by ensuring every eligible voter can access the ballot. Are you with me? \- Stacey **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa512/34a064cc/18c6851c/70310cb/2847017309/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE093019SYA-eoq-3a")**
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa512/34a064cc/18c6851c/70310c8/2847017309/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa512/34a064cc/18c6851c/70310c9/2847017309/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa512/34a064cc/18c6851c/70310d6/2847017309/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

we're running out of time | |

#
Democrats are determined to turn America into a socialist country. With BOTH of our Senate seats on the ballot with President Trump next year, Georgia is the last line of defense. **And we need your help RIGHT NOW. **

Our quarterly fundraising deadline is at 11:59 TONIGHT. [**For a limited time, we’ve activated a QUADRUPLE MATCH for all donations. Will you step up right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=4116e577af&e=02cd889ad3)
---

---
| **America simply can’t afford Chuck Schumer in control of the U.S. Senate, but if Democrats win in Georgia, that’s exactly what will happen.** That would mean the end of President Trump’s winning agenda. It would mean socialized medicine. It would mean higher taxes. It would mean open borders, and free health care for those here illegally.

**It’s up to US to fight back. That’s why we’ve activated a QUADRUPLE MATCH at this critical time.**

[**Please, chip in whatever you can afford before 11:59 PM TONIGHT. It could make all the difference.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=263c8cd01e&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything.

David

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Fundraising DEADLINE
body:
Midnight tonight is our end of quarter fundraising deadline, and we are behind in reaching our goal.
Donate TODAY (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=98ed6d6ed7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_21_12_02_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-98ed6d6ed7-32267927)

I’ve spent my time over the last couple of months knocking on doors, visiting civic clubs, and speaking with people in the district, instead of calling strangers to ask for money to fund our campaign.

I’m asking you to contribute today because over the next 4 months we will be transitioning the campaign to concentrate on the issues that people have been talking to me about, ramping up our work on voter contact, and continuing our community engagement efforts. (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=98ed6d6ed7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_21_12_02_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-98ed6d6ed7-32267927)

We have a reliable, strong, and dedicated team of volunteers. I have the ability to utilize the resources we have and execute our plan to win in March. I am confident in this because I have heard the voice of the people, and I hear what they want. Our community is yearning for guidance, strong leadership, and energized passion. I am prepared to answer the call, to bring our district, state, and nation back on track, by promoting inclusivity, decency, and humanity.

Donate to our campaign before midnight tonight.
Donate TODAY (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=98ed6d6ed7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_21_12_02_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-98ed6d6ed7-32267927)
Thank you,

Marc

I’m asking you to contribute today because over the next 4 months we will be transitioning the campaign to concentrate on the issues that people have been talking to me about, ramping up our work on voter contact, and continuing our community engagement efforts. () We have a reliable, strong, and dedicated team of volunteers. I have the ability to utilize the resources we have and execute our plan to win in March. I am confident in this because I have heard the voice of the people, and I hear what they want. Our community is yearning for guidance, strong leadership, and energized passion. I am prepared to answer the call, to bring our district, state, and nation back on track, by promoting inclusivity, decency, and humanity. Donate to our campaign before midnight tonight. Donate TODAY () Thank you, Marc ============================================================ Facebook () Facebook () Twitter () Twitter () Instagram () Instagram () Website () Website () Copyright © 2019 Marc Flores for Congress, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Marc Flores for Congress P.O. Box 924332 Houston, TX 77292 ** Add us to your address book ()

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Just HOURS left
body:
We only have hours left until the deadline — we need your support today.
Everyone,
Today is the final day of the month, and we're falling behind on our fundraising goal. We know that you’re a strong supporter of principled conservative policy, so we wanted to check in.

Did we hear from you this month? If not, please donate now to support America Next and ensure that we can continue to spread our ideas nationwide.

We only have hours left until the deadline — we need your support today.

If you haven't already, please donate now. And if we missed something, please let us know. We can’t wait to hear from you!

[https://secure.anedot.com/americanext/c1e956397fe7d1ecf9fdb](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=8cf1e592f82044828a0c2868958b3e75&_e=nOy47nTHmnxA9RdNKyCjDk-n_PyQp3854FNdmnkK7AGggZbp331-vvd73-Md2NVy2HpmGJzBThSgFcQfXf8c7fefm19IRV2mmq8LDm98ThiUSpqFeHICB09tJCCrGncFsHlniA7CSNq_DvgbxTlAOFAKPjfeicfesEpQcbwATKNhAhaUTFXvTlKbR46n-VQScZvDCUPBDOjJwkzA_vyJ5OCa7xtpiX1ZwOPOWgsMu0Zx8NpVnS1RmBwE2eSbSfVrWjN8Q5nEsbKSN4GvUBz2krmYILMF9WFLnUgVJ6NX6-2zo3f-2eJzTChL0whPgZpbiPEYgzG8wkWsJF0ePj7x6SLvqTNePALVFvmOEW6s0i0Xpdoq8BSeVy_HQhzRfHsK75M77KY_Bhva4knv_SLHmw%3D%3D)

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Fight for our Commonwealth's future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
A contribution will go directly to the candidates who are on the front lines fighting for our Commonwealth's future.
|
---

---

---
| | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21de/39260142/42658781/62639519/2661301788/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa19")
---
Friends-- Today is the day. Every dollar you contribute before midnight tonight will show that Democrats have the momentum heading into November's elections. The Way Ahead has supported Democrats with over $800,000 in contributions, but we still have more work to do if we are going to turn the General Assembly blue in just over a month. **[Can you chip in $25, $50, or $100 to keep the momentum going?](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21de/39260142/42658781/62639518/2661301788/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019")** We have made real progress over the last two years: Medicaid expansion for approximately 400,000 Virginians, the lowest unemployment rate in Virginia's history, the largest teacher pay raise in years, and expansion of early childhood education. But the biggest challenge is ahead of us. We must pass common sense gun safety legislation, and we need a Democratic majority to do it. [**Stand with us by making a contribution today. Any amount you give will go directly to the candidates who are on the front lines fighting for our Commonwealth's future.**](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21de/39260142/42658781/62639518/2661301788/VEsF/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019") Thank you for everything you do to help us move our Commonwealth forward. Take care, Ralph

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: They really, really, really want me to lose.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d3bd/6cd27893/526f8288/15873d5f/3722600905/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Let me be blunt. Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell want to put Oregon in play in 2020. After all, Hillary Clinton won just 50.07% of the vote here in 2016. They want to recruit a top-flight challenger to take me on. And it's our job to do everything we can to stop that. A big part of that challenge? Demonstrating that we're ready to once again build the biggest grassroots campaign in Oregon history -- just like we did in 2008 and 2014. [**Will you dig deep and chip in $3 or more to help us demonstrate our grassroots strength before tonight at midnight?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d3bd/6cd27893/526f8288/15873d5c/3722600905/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-09-30-eoq&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") **Another generous donor, a family in Portland, has stepped up to match the first $2,800 we raise today.** I've spent the last few years making a whole bunch of big enemies with deep pockets. People who don't like I'm taking on the Trump administration. People who don't like my work to stop climate chaos, end our nation's cruel immigration policies, fix our broken gun safety laws, and reduce the cost of health care (including prescription drugs.) I'm talking about the NRA. I'm talking about big polluters and the Kochs. I'm talking about Big Pharma. I'm talking about _everyone_ who is counting on Mitch McConnell's obstructionist agenda. _They_ want to put Oregon in play. That's why I'm counting on your support. [**Donate $3 before the end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and let's close out this last $2,800 match by midnight tonight.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d3bd/6cd27893/526f8288/15873d5c/3722600905/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-09-30-eoq&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Let's work to take Oregon off the map and win back the Senate in 2020. Onward, **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d3bd/6cd27893/526f8288/15873d5d/3722600905/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-09-30-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d3bd/6cd27893/526f8288/15873d5a/3722600905/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-09-30-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d3bd/6cd27893/526f8288/15873d5b/3722600905/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-09-30-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d3bd/6cd27893/526f8288/15873d58/3722600905/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-09-30-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons")

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/b36GqkJVLj5FyjJ7_u19ucWTawTu6WBGsZ3o9DT6Rls=/NBqPdoGGafWSsyP2HKY2lswfjTSRpms64ZK3yrXV2FQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.30_b2_mghq_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
This election is about all of us, friends.

Margaret is running for Congress because we the people should take priority over special interests and partisan politics in Washington.

**The campaign we 've built this first quarter reflects that message, and in just 9 hours, we'll have our first chance to prove it to everyone. **

[**But we still have a lot of work to do before MIDNIGHT, friends. We 're $5,272 behind our ambitious end-of-quarter fundraising goal -- please help out by chipping in with a donation today! >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/b36GqkJVLj5FyjJ7_u19ucWTawTu6WBGsZ3o9DT6Rls=/NBqPdoGGafWSsyP2HKY2lswfjTSRpms64ZK3yrXV2FQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.30_b2_mghq_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

From start to finish and at every milestone along the path to Election Day, Margaret is making sure the campaign is owned by real folks like you -- because that's the way we protect our democracy and return power to the people.

Right now, toxic algae blooms threaten our waterways and put at risk our local economy; people don't go to the doctor when they're sick because they can't afford it; and in Florida and the rest of the country, public school dollars are being funneled to unaccountable private charters.

**These are really big problems and we need serious solutions to solve them. That 's why Margaret is running for Congress.**

[**With your help, we know we can raise the final $5,272 of our end-of-quarter goal in 9 hours. A donation of any size would make a huge difference, so please, contribute here before our midnight public fundraising deadline. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/b36GqkJVLj5FyjJ7_u19ucWTawTu6WBGsZ3o9DT6Rls=/NBqPdoGGafWSsyP2HKY2lswfjTSRpms64ZK3yrXV2FQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.30_b2_mghq_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

subject: please read this, it's important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there: Our big public FEC deadline is TONIGHT, everyone, and our numbers are really dragging. In fact, we've raised less in September than we have in months!
This matters because Trump was in New Hampshire rallying support for Republicans recently, and Senator Hassan only won in 2016 by 1,017 votes.
New Hampshire campaigns always come down to the wire, and every dollar we raise could mean protecting this seat or turning it over to the GOP. That's why we have to ask:
[**Please give $3 or more to stop Donald Trump and Republicans from buying this seat. clean_body: Hi there: Our big public FEC deadline is TONIGHT, everyone, and our numbers are really dragging. In fact, we've raised less in September than we have in months! This matters because Trump was in New Hampshire rallying support for Republicans recently, and Senator Hassan only won in 2016 by 1,017 votes. New Hampshire campaigns always come down to the wire, and every dollar we raise could mean protecting this seat or turning it over to the GOP. That's why we have to ask: "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" The amount we raise will give Trump a clear message about the strength of our campaign and with his increased focused on the Granite State, we can't afford to fall short. Time is running out so we really appreciate you jumping in. -- Team Maggie "" _

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: House Democrats Resist a Win for American Workers
body:
"President Trump and the leaders of Canada and Mexico announced the most significant trade deal in a generation a year ago this week." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=41b3013c94&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **House Democrats Resist a Win for American Workers**

“President Trump and the leaders of Canada and Mexico announced the most significant trade deal in a generation a year ago this week. The U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement is unambiguously a win for America. It would create new jobs, expand export markets, strengthen protections for workers, and generate billions of dollars in new prosperity,” Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) and House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) write in _The Wall Street Journal_.

“The U.S. Senate stands ready, willing and eager to pass it. There’s only one obstacle, which has been on full display in the last several days: House Democrats have been more interested in picking fights with the White House than clinching bipartisan victories for America. Under pressure from progressives to deny the country any successes during the Trump administration, Speaker Nancy Pelosi has tried to run out the clock on the USMCA,” they write.

“If Mrs. Pelosi and House Democrats tank this trade deal because they don’t like the occupant of the White House, ‘Trump derangement syndrome’ will no longer be some Beltway curiosity. It will have drained potential prosperity from all 50 states and killed a huge number of American jobs.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=896761a2af&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In _[The Federalist](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05f1910853&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Sean Davis reports that the intelligence community secretly revised the formal whistleblower complaint form in August 2019 to conveniently eliminate the requirement of direct, first-hand knowledge of wrongdoing. The new version of the form, which was not made public until after the complaint about President Trump’s phone call with the Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky was made public, “allows employees to file whistleblower complaints even if they have zero direct knowledge of underlying evidence” and only heard about alleged wrongdoing from others.
---
|
---
| Last week’s House “Intelligence” Committee hearing “quickly devolved into another comical farce when Rep. Adam B. Schiff, California Democrat and ‘intelligence’ chairman, kicked off the hearing by setting aside the just-released transcript of the telephone call between Mr. Trump and the president of Ukraine. He chose instead to read an entirely made up, fraudulent and fabricated transcript of a call that never occurred,” Charles Hurt writes in _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d063daeb2&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| One of the most important online communities of Trump supporters is effectively being destroyed, conservative social media star Carpe Donktum writes in _[Human Events](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28987739bc&e=3ee4985eea)_. What was once a vibrant digital meeting place on Reddit, known as “The_Donald,” is being “quarantined” by the site’s administrators. “Reddit’s strategy is transparent. It has established a template that other social media companies can model to effectively silence conservatives. This strategy slowly turns down the volume on conservative users and platforms instead of banning them outright. By breaking their censorship into varied opaque components, it becomes more difficult to pinpoint, challenging to prove, and nearly impossible to oppose.”

---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05dc94d185&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d55605319&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=95c66cd3ef)
