clean_body: "President Trump and the leaders of Canada and Mexico announced the most significant trade deal in a generation a year ago this week." | | | | | | | House Democrats Resist a Win for American Workers “President Trump and the leaders of Canada and Mexico announced the most significant trade deal in a generation a year ago this week. The U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement is unambiguously a win for America. It would create new jobs, expand export markets, strengthen protections for workers, and generate billions of dollars in new prosperity,” Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) and House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) write in The Wall Street Journal. “The U.S. Senate stands ready, willing and eager to pass it. There’s only one obstacle, which has been on full display in the last several days: House Democrats have been more interested in picking fights with the White House than clinching bipartisan victories for America. Under pressure from progressives to deny the country any successes during the Trump administration, Speaker Nancy Pelosi has tried to run out the clock on the USMCA,” they write. “If Mrs. Pelosi and House Democrats tank this trade deal because they don’t like the occupant of the White House, ‘Trump derangement syndrome’ will no longer be some Beltway curiosity. It will have drained potential prosperity from all 50 states and killed a huge number of American jobs.” | | In , Sean Davis reports that the intelligence community secretly revised the formal whistleblower complaint form in August 2019 to conveniently eliminate the requirement of direct, first-hand knowledge of wrongdoing. The new version of the form, which was not made public until after the complaint about President Trump’s phone call with the Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky was made public, “allows employees to file whistleblower complaints even if they have zero direct knowledge of underlying evidence” and only heard about alleged wrongdoing from others. | | Last week’s House “Intelligence” Committee hearing “quickly devolved into another comical farce when Rep. Adam B. Schiff, California Democrat and ‘intelligence’ chairman, kicked off the hearing by setting aside the just-released transcript of the telephone call between Mr. Trump and the president of Ukraine. He chose instead to read an entirely made up, fraudulent and fabricated transcript of a call that never occurred,” Charles Hurt writes in . | | One of the most important online communities of Trump supporters is effectively being destroyed, conservative social media star Carpe Donktum writes in . What was once a vibrant digital meeting place on Reddit, known as “The_Donald,” is being “quarantined” by the site’s administrators. “Reddit’s strategy is transparent. It has established a template that other social media companies can model to effectively silence conservatives. This strategy slowly turns down the volume on conservative users and platforms instead of banning them outright. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Closing the books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
At midnight tonight, we're closing the books on our very first FEC reporting deadline of our campaign. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714af/691c9bd/6e269348/11a7a5a8/1252031807/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

At midnight tonight, we're closing the books on our very first FEC reporting deadline of our campaign.

The truth is, we've had a remarkable start in this race, and it's never been more clear to me just how fed up the people of Colorado are with Cory Gardner and the political games he plays in Washington.

[**_We 're less than a day away from the deadline, and we're coming up a bit short--before midnight, will you donate to help reach our goal?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190930_JH_20190930-fr-JH-tonight-all_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Team, I'm fed up too, and it's time we turn the page. My number one priority as your senator will be fighting for the people of Colorado. Full stop.

But I want to be honest about what we're up against. Gardner has a massive machine behind him that will stop at nothing to hang on to this seat. Corporate PACs and special interests like the NRA will pour money in to support his campaign--and the president and Mitch McConnell will use every lever of their power to support him.

I'm not taking a nickel of corporate PAC money, and I'm counting on everyday people--not special interests--to power this campaign.

**The only way we win is through a grassroots team like this one that is more powerful than all of those forces.**

My campaign isn't beholden to special interests. I'm running to change how Washington works and to fight for you and your family. In the U.S. Senate, the only people I work for will be the people of Colorado.

[**_But we need your support --before the FEC deadline at midnight tonight, please consider making a donation to help reach our quarterly goal._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190930_JH_20190930-fr-JH-tonight-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190930_JH_20190930-fr-JH-tonight-all_all_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $25 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_20190930_JH_20190930-fr-JH-tonight-all_all_expresslane25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $50 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20190930_JH_20190930-fr-JH-tonight-all_all_expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $100 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20190930_JH_20190930-fr-JH-tonight-all_all_expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714af/691c9bd/6e269348/11a7a5dc/1252031807/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714af/691c9bd/6e269348/11a7a5dd/1252031807/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714af/691c9bd/6e269348/11a7a5da/1252031807/VEsHAA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714af/691c9bd/6e269348/11a7a5db/1252031807/VEsHAw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714af/691c9bd/6e269348/11a7a5d8/1252031807/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714af/691c9bd/6e269348/11a7a5df/1252031807/VEsHDQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").
clean_body: At midnight tonight, we're closing the books on our very first FEC reporting deadline of our campaign. | | | "" | Team, At midnight tonight, we're closing the books on our very first FEC reporting deadline of our campaign. The truth is, we've had a remarkable start in this race, and it's never been more clear to me just how fed up the people of Colorado are with Cory Gardner and the political games he plays in Washington. "=" Team, I'm fed up too, and it's time we turn the page. My number one priority as your senator will be fighting for the people of Colorado. Full stop. But I want to be honest about what we're up against. Gardner has a massive machine behind him that will stop at nothing to hang on to this seat. Corporate PACs and special interests like the NRA will pour money in to support his campaign--and the president and Mitch McConnell will use every lever of their power to support him. I'm not taking a nickel of corporate PAC money, and I'm counting on everyday people--not special interests--to power this campaign. The only way we win is through a grassroots team like this one that is more powerful than all of those forces. My campaign isn't beholden to special interests. I'm running to change how Washington works and to fight for you and your family. In the U.S. Senate, the only people I work for will be the people of Colorado. "=" If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away. "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" Thank you, John "=" | | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The ACA is saving lives -- but not if Trump has anything to say about it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, More studies were just released and confirmed what we already knew: the Affordable Care Act is literally saving lives. In states that expanded their Medicaid coverage under the ACA, people were more likely to seek treatment for their health issues, and they were more likely to seek it earlier. This translated into higher success rates of treatment and longer life expectancies. This news starkly contrasts the Census Bureau's announcement earlier this month that the number of Americans without health insurance coverage has risen for the first time since 2009 \-- 2 million additional people went without life-saving insurance in 2018, bringing the total to 8.5 percent of the population. This increase is credited to people getting kicked off public programs such as Medicaid, which Trump has been directly targeting to undermine the ACA. His draconian healthcare policies put millions of Americans at risk because they aren't able to afford basic healthcare and now don't qualify for public assistance. We want to hear from YOU: **Do you support the Affordable Care Act?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddd1/6e9863e8/15394c0a/1db0d2e6/2684771788/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/7COi-DHY") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddd1/6e9863e8/15394c0a/1db0d2e6/2684771788/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/7COi-DHY") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddd1/6e9863e8/15394c0a/1db0d2e4/2684771788/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190930a.ND-b&refcode2=QK7klNAfj9fij9ZW9cyR")

name: James Carville
subject: McConnell SCREWED
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I told ya Mitch McConnell could lose his seat AND the Senate.

I told ya even _Fox News_ admits he has the WORST approval rating in the Senate.

I told ya if we lose New Mexico, Democrats will LOSE the Senate.

subject: What a good governor does
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
I'll be straightforward with you, as leaders should be: we're slightly behind where we want to be as we reach the end of September.
|
---

| | Peter, I'll be straightforward with you, as leaders should be: we're slightly behind where we want to be as we reach the end of September.

And with the election barely over a month away, and only a few goals left to hit, I'm not sure we can afford to miss this one. So, I'm asking: can you pitch in a few dollars right now at the link below?

name: Peter Khalil
subject: Time is Running Out!
body:
| | | | Donate by 11:59 today!
---
---
**—**
It's the last day of summer quarter! Please contribute by 11:59 pm today to make sure this people-powered campaign can keep its lights on! Over the past 90 days, we've focused on meeting as many people as we can. We've attended fairs, parades, and community gatherings all over our district. From Pacific to Skamania, we've heard your stories, shared your community traditions, and petted your dogs. We've also picked up two endorsements thanks to Our Revolution Washington and the Washington State Progressive Caucus!
As we gear up for the fall, we'll be buying yard signs, shirts, and other necessary campaign supplies. We'll be building up our phone-banking and mailing infrastructure. We'll also be searching out an office, so that our growing team can have a place to congregate. We don't need big money for this campaign. A $5 monthly recurring contribution is all it will take to keep us sustainable.
Fall quarter will bring a lot of changes. We'll be walking our talk about making your stories possible by taking part in community service projects all over our region. Where there's service to be done, we'll be there. We'll begin meeting you at your doors, holding issue rallies, town halls, and meet-and-greets in each county. We need your financial support to do all these things and more. We're counting on you.
With gratitude and excitement, Peter

---
Fuel the Progressive movement in SW Washington by becoming a sustaining donor!
---

This isn't just about our next FEC report. It's about whether or not this team can stay on a path to win the nomination.
Hitting our initial $1.7 million goal last night means that it's never been more clear that there's a spot for us in this race. Now, we can make more investments in early states and keep building the infrastructure that a winning campaign needs. **But let 's not stop now -- we need to raise $146,892.31 before midnight tonight to hit $2 million.**
**[So I'm asking you: Can you make a donation before tonight's FEC deadline to help send Cory all the way to the White House?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190930_AD_20190930-fr-AD-newgoal-ndnrs_ndnrs_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I know $2 million is an ambitious goal -- one I wouldn't have thought possible at the beginning of this sprint. But if I've learned one thing from Cory -- and from all of you -- it's that, together, we can run at the toughest challenges and get the job done.
Less than 11 hours to do it,
Addisu
Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190930_AD_20190930-fr-AD-newgoal-ndnrs_ndnrs_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
P.S. I told my staff (and the world on Twitter), that **[if we manage to hit $2 million by tonight's deadline](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190930_AD_20190930-fr-AD-newgoal-ndnrs_ndnrs_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** , I'll join Cory as a vegan for the full month of October. Here's to a dietary challenge in October.
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b81/5fca0d19/77aa9fac/291f13dc/4143819501/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b81/5fca0d19/77aa9fac/291f13db/4143819501/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b81/5fca0d19/77aa9fac/291f13da/4143819501/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b81/5fca0d19/77aa9fac/291f13d9/4143819501/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b81/5fca0d19/77aa9fac/291f13d8/4143819501/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b81/5fca0d19/77aa9fac/291f13dc/4143819501/VEsHAA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

body:
We've set some pretty ambitious goals for this FEC deadline, because we're ambitious about the work we're going to need to do in these next few months. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529b00/45c30650/10b13fdc5/668feb03/880044635/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Today is the FEC deadline, and we only have until midnight to reach our fundraising goal.

We're a little behind, but you still won't find me jetting from city to city, scooping up big checks from wealthy donors.

Instead, this weekend, I spoke with people at Clinton College in South Carolina about how we're going to make our economy and our government work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected.

And while on the road, I got to call supporters like Maura, who chipped in $3, and Lucas, who chipped in $10.

**Every day, I'm grateful to grassroots donors for making it possible to spend my time with people all across the country.

We're going to keep building our movement this way, but it only works if everyone who is able to pitches in. And right now, we're focused on this FEC deadline.**

[**Will you chip in for the first time before midnight to own a piece of this grassroots movement?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529b00/45c30650/10b13fdc5/668feb02/880044635/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMkJGX0VPUV9HT0xfRV8yMDE5MDkzMF9WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ2BF_EOQ_GOL_E_20190930_V1S2_P")

>
We've set some pretty ambitious goals for this FEC deadline, because we're ambitious about the work we're going to need to do in these next few months.

Here's what we have on the schedule: more traveling throughout states across the country, more town halls, and more selfie lines. And every step of the way we will be recruiting volunteers, opening offices, and focusing on door-to-door, person-to-person organizing.

**It all starts with the resources we raise before tonight's midnight deadline.**

[**I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important: will you chip in $3 before midnight to power the next phase of this campaign?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529b00/45c30650/10b13fdc5/668feb02/880044635/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMkJGX0VPUV9HT0xfRV8yMDE5MDkzMF9WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ2BF_EOQ_GOL_E_20190930_V1S2_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Run, Corey, Run!
subject: U.S. Senator Corey Lewandowski
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STAND WITH COREY

body:
Any donation using the links in this email will automatically enter you for a chance to win a signed MATH hat. You have until tonight at midnight to enter -- pitch in now.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1152%2E377263%2E5slymi) Hey Yang Gang --

**BIG NEWS: We’re upping the stakes. Our new goal is $2 million by 11:59 PM tonight.**

We're raising the goal because we know we will be outraised this quarter, and this campaign needs to reach new heights if we’re going to take on the other candidates in this race. **And to celebrate -- we’re giving one lucky winner our signature MATH hat signed by Andrew Yang himself. Donate any amount now and you’ll be entered for a chance to win:** [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12193?t=7&akid=1152%2E377263%2E5slymi) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12193?t=15-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=1152%2E377263%2E5slymi)

name: MichaelBennet.com
subject: 90 percent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
The majority of Democrats don't know who they're voting for yet. | |
---
| Team,

The DNC is working hard to prematurely winnow the field of presidential candidates.

Here's the truth: [Recent history has shown us that early frontrunners aren't the ultimate winners in presidential races.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf06/134673f2/add77d0/699612aa/774549722/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_093019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

In August 2003, Joe Lieberman was leading the pack. In a matter of months, John Kerry went from a low-polling long shot to the de facto Democratic nominee.

Barack Obama was trailing by double digits until he won the Iowa Caucus.

Early polls weren't predictive of how things would develop and change on the campaign trail over the course of weeks and months.

[Right now, polls show that 90% of Democrats haven't decided who they'll vote for.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf06/134673f2/add77d0/699612aa/774549722/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_093019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

We know that Michael is just getting started, but today we're facing two critical deadlines: a public reporting deadline and a debate qualifier threshold.

[So that's why we're asking, Team. Will you make your first donation today? Any amount you can give -- $3, $5, or even $25 -- will get us closer to achieving our goal to raise another $15O,OOO before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf06/134673f2/add77d0/699612aa/774549722/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_093019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [RUSH $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf06/134673f2/add77d0/699612ae/774549722/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_093019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our campaign has made incredible progress, and we continue to build support across the country.

Since Michael hasn't spent a lifetime in politics, many people didn't know him when he announced his candidacy -- but they're paying attention now!

_Now we 're planning for what comes next._

As a senator from a purple state, Michael has never known an easy election, and he's ready to continue this fight.

[We need to know that you're standing with us.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf06/134673f2/add77d0/699612aa/774549722/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_093019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Your support is critical ahead of these crucial deadlines. Will you make your first donation right now to shut down the doubters? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf06/134673f2/add77d0/699612aa/774549722/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B1_093019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Team Bennet

Hi! I know you’re probably swamped with emails, so I’ll make this quick: this FEC deadline is crucial to our campaign.
Right now we’re only $397 away from reaching our goal — so if 40 people give $10 right now, we’ll definitely reach our goal by midnight.
Peter, I’m counting on you. Can you step up and contribute to help us close the gap before midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-fec-sept19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190930_3_9&amount=15&recurring=true]

subject: I'm happy to announce
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
I'm happy to announce that our campaign reached our target for this quarter just hours before tonight's midnight fundraising deadline!

**But I know we can still do even better in these last few hours we have left.**

_That 's why I'm making one last ask to you and all my loyal supporters tonight to donate just $3 to help us top-off a strong fundraising quarter! _

Stand With Mark Kelly is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55.
For 2020, we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating Trump and turning Arizona blue. We recruited astronaut Mark Kelly to run for Arizona's US Senate seat, are working to win a key Arizona Congressional seat and to flip both houses of the Arizona State Legislature.
If you'd like to support the Stand With Mark Kelly Campaign, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4461/4bd7760e/43dd87b8/77e04eb3/1463747862/VEsHAA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footerdmk?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=15+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190930_KellyEOQ_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190930_KellyEOQ_U2_X3")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4461/4bd7760e/43dd87b8/77e04eb2/1463747862/VEsHAw/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=16+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190930_KellyEOQ_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190930_KellyEOQ_U2_X3")

name: Adam Hattersley
subject: I need seven people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
Peter,

I know it’s late but I thought I’d give it one more ask.

Right now my campaign is just SEVEN donations away from making our FEC goal and I would hate for us to come so close, but still come up short.

I know it’s late on a Monday night, but I was hoping you could help?

I can’t tell you how much my team and I would appreciate it.

Here’s the link if you can make it happen: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q32019](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10437716/104867269/-413514637?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIxZjM1NC1kZGUzLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n919wQoFHOb7oZ-56HNBAUjNoSKElPNSJkLfQ7oCKA8=&refcode=Em_fr_2019.09.30_b2_ah_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1)**

-Adam

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Do we need campaign finance reform?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Mitch McConnell has finally caved on his promise to not pass any prorgressive legislation, relenting to criticism and approving an additional $250 million in funding to states to improve voting systems and stop foreign meddling. However, this $250 million is being split across all 50 states and other territories, amounting to drops in a bucket compared to the billions needed for actual election reform. Mitch refuses to budge on any other election reforms that would help voters and restore confidence in our democracy \-- because he knows that making voting easier and more accessible will hurt Republicans. That's why he's blocking a vote on a constitutional amendment that ends the 2010 _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision, a ruling that opened the floodgates to nearly unlimited political spending in elections. We're asking engaged Democrats what they think. If that sounds like you, please answer our quick survey: **Do we need campaign finance reform?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddd3/6e9863e8/153a3b3e/1db0ed6d/485017531/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/mdMjV_85") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddd3/6e9863e8/153a3b3e/1db0ed6d/485017531/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/mdMjV_85") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddd3/6e9863e8/153a3b3e/1db0ed72/485017531/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190930b.ND-b&refcode2=38xMdZnimhdVWEOsa9Qw")

But his gravest offense is infecting our country with his racism and bigotry.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. Thank you for signing my petition to stop the liberal Democrats in Albany and Washington from allowing undocumented immigrants to vote in our elections.
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DhFMg3cWId01aEAusqVdbpua1_vA5M0G2n3oM1ywMDllPtgLpUMu1J3dU_dFLgbZRhEY9oy3JnaoCuRtxPbOERIMDyb1QS-DSnTTOuL3c8p5h-YDUXQcPI1ttJxMQOLJW_7vyaKRg62WvwPXhV46mw==&c=nWS4joazAJ-ina7bJZXCQ8fR1QWSAs8l-lVHmvl3rbeo6ySEXr8XaQ==&ch=N1x-fFKgpcXpg-IxQoZIsWBFqdwzJGDRcQ47VCzw0BA8JSKlp_aEYA==)

| Dear Friend,
Thank you for signing my petition to stop the liberal Democrats in Albany and Washington from allowing undocumented immigrants to vote in our elections.
Last month, I successfully led the effort to stop the Democrats who control the State Legislature from passing a new law that would have automatically registered illegal immigrants to vote. It also would have eliminated the legal penalties for illegally voting. [Click here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DhFMg3cWId01aEAusqVdbpua1_vA5M0G2n3oM1ywMDllPtgLpUMu1CV1CggODfuR7Jtlbhrvk8mK191bKbr0RHFzaxI20CqYLOHB2QxgjVcdS3NEYOXoDg3ZNrEkybEr1bP5QS0_gmowp06_tk-DlYgoa1SuxErwgli1FklPq0oIbcl9XDV8-22CybIMASKdx_LGCPdKXdE3lHepMvD3Ezfz5B3Z5Ya8-bwqePaoqdkYnu631sqO6y9AEIaIRPPQ-Qq9iPPdGmKGT2xByEIs6HRt17n-TXG6ARkNait6pwV1ZkJOsOtoHal812iT7Sk7&c=nWS4joazAJ-ina7bJZXCQ8fR1QWSAs8l-lVHmvl3rbeo6ySEXr8XaQ==&ch=N1x-fFKgpcXpg-IxQoZIsWBFqdwzJGDRcQ47VCzw0BA8JSKlp_aEYA==) to listen to my interview on Breitbart News Sunday explaining how it all went down.
While we stopped them this year, these radical politicians have proposed other measures allowing illegal immigrants to [vote in the past](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DhFMg3cWId01aEAusqVdbpua1_vA5M0G2n3oM1ywMDllPtgLpUMu1F7rzC8Cjkl82bA6KS4sCzkOZdyfboz5RaGEEc5A1N2yFQVl0SBS_7jp8GrCjCr4tzv3TQXWl9rZbzYDRuzvGJg9WqMZrA360XEQpSawppz5E0R7UiMUS3dmNAW7z4KJ0peiVDNoYTBvvKaZgIMc3ygRn7EXtsX4qI9SeE8aeg9d4A8inaSHsNiheX83xAkegACyoHz31Y5uevp154YL2ok=&c=nWS4joazAJ-ina7bJZXCQ8fR1QWSAs8l-lVHmvl3rbeo6ySEXr8XaQ==&ch=N1x-fFKgpcXpg-IxQoZIsWBFqdwzJGDRcQ47VCzw0BA8JSKlp_aEYA==). By signing my petition, you are helping us keep up the fight and preserve the integrity of our elections.
In Washington, my opponent, Max Rose, [voted in the House of Representatives](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DhFMg3cWId01aEAusqVdbpua1_vA5M0G2n3oM1ywMDllPtgLpUMu1F7rzC8Cjkl8Clh2Ihsh6LsQ8kVFesBHi1_AYcOd12vmkJD0Bgw95UU2uDswl_Uc0zWcv6tlcYyGBrTzKF6sJnBAONe-PZnD4kBtJueMlLGtHc8QDhH1FtYsCWHX0-8t5EbOLgOVQ0B5MNqcF46Dd-e3BZhWTeMijgejzY5INd9Mou7Qr5dzyjUijivIpE9JkQ==&c=nWS4joazAJ-ina7bJZXCQ8fR1QWSAs8l-lVHmvl3rbeo6ySEXr8XaQ==&ch=N1x-fFKgpcXpg-IxQoZIsWBFqdwzJGDRcQ47VCzw0BA8JSKlp_aEYA==) to support the ability of illegal immigrants to vote in local elections. And he voted to give amnesty to known gang members who are in our country illegally. As New York City's only Republican voice in Congress, I will partner with President Trump to secure our borders and provide the No Nonsense Leadership our country needs.
Again, thank you for signing my petition and joining our fight.
---
| Sincerely, Nicole

body:
Thank you for signing my petition calling on Speaker Nancy Pelosi and the House Democratic Leadership to remove Rep. Ilhan Omar from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010niobQ4-gPlvWHtDtf_PNL3DOZOLHa4ebRUtLvoKPQn6VI6bm5GiBZXX5VZZbknKk0Tlt5dnc5os0nOZdIM1vQr4GPcFGVnPv7q8qDE1f8O2l3QHYbZ4sS36g6EwAv5szwfp3Un0VPdq32MHt4QI2g==&c=XYg6g2xnod54yOsg3Q7XR5_qyNXZrkOWLg6AzROTah_Tk3JI6ItTTw==&ch=NarlVOgb3g92MpJMlxy2i3R7V0jiEnUe19gFvHEIxDu6iI5QUNQ1wg==)

| Dear Friend,
Thank you for signing my petition calling on Speaker Nancy Pelosi and the House Democratic Leadership to remove Rep. Ilhan Omar from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.
As a member of the committee responsible for overseeing our foreign policy, Congresswoman Omar has referred to 9-11 as the time "some people did some thing." She used pro-American, pro-democracy demonstrations in Hong Kong as an opportunity to criticize our country and she blamed American policies for the economic and humanitarian crisis caused by foreign dictators.
Rep. Omar has a long history of statements against Israel, including her allegation that American support for Israel was the result of campaign contributions. (She said, "It's all about the Benjamins, baby.") The rhetoric she used has been so offensive that the House of Representatives has twice passed resolutions condemning it.
[Despite this record, Max Rose has been Omar's leading defender--calling her a "friend" and extolling their "shared values."](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010niobQ4-gPlvWHtDtf_PNL3DOZOLHa4ebRUtLvoKPQn6VI6bm5GiBQmUpy6nTew0G-HHvjwEWmiRkH6tx6i3F-oSU1leAuYNSFLkKEr8cmJyC1pwP2ROISsWrGthl-YP1M_k7ks33WQDT1bA_xJ85k91YVy5UHkQohWv1Tqu9RL4blUdrfqid3Sohu9e4vxNSmwbwJUu2ED-Rzz3CxbTc9BmrBNHs3ibr4uoqBRS4mGF0k95wjeq43a_mbkd5-5puwve4O5SrfAIFvCueI4gsZd3t6Wr8vbgFmvWow8DBqLsdpnQkIeIIQ==&c=XYg6g2xnod54yOsg3Q7XR5_qyNXZrkOWLg6AzROTah_Tk3JI6ItTTw==&ch=NarlVOgb3g92MpJMlxy2i3R7V0jiEnUe19gFvHEIxDu6iI5QUNQ1wg==)
Unlike Max, I believe her statements and conduct are inexcusable. And that she must be removed from the Foreign Affairs Committee. Now!
Thank you for signing my petition. Together, we will make it clear that Congresswoman Omar does not share our values and that it's wrong for a member of such an important committee to espouse an anti-American world view.
---
| Sincerely, Nicole

clean_body: Thank you for signing my petition calling on Speaker Nancy Pelosi and the House Democratic Leadership to remove Rep. Ilhan Omar from the House Foreign Affairs Committee. | | | | | | == | | | Dear Friend, Thank you for signing my petition calling on Speaker Nancy Pelosi and the House Democratic Leadership to remove Rep. Ilhan Omar from the House Foreign Affairs Committee. As a member of the committee responsible for overseeing our foreign policy, Congresswoman Omar has referred to 9-11 as the time "some people did some thing." She used pro-American, pro-democracy demonstrations in Hong Kong as an opportunity to criticize our country and she blamed American policies for the economic and humanitarian crisis caused by foreign dictators. Rep. Omar has a long history of statements against Israel, including her allegation that American support for Israel was the result of campaign contributions. (She said, "It's all about the Benjamins, baby.") The rhetoric she used has been so offensive that the House of Representatives has twice passed resolutions condemning it. == Unlike Max, I believe her statements and conduct are inexcusable. And that she must be removed from the Foreign Affairs Committee. Now! Thank you for signing my petition. Together, we will make it clear that Congresswoman Omar does not share our values and that it's wrong for a member of such an important committee to espouse an anti-American world view. | Sincerely, Nicole == == == | | | | | == | | | Paid for by Nicole for New York (FEDERAL) | | | == == == | | Nicole for New York (FEDERAL) | PO Box 68, South Salem, NY 10590 | | Sent by mailto:nicole@nicoleforny.com

body:
House Democratic Leadership needs to stop the impeachment nonsense and get back to the important work they were elected to do.
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TlKpB6ThWnUYOVo_443EVAmMmmlBSvbAyWN8XDlFKwPFa9RcxpaR9WuwPxstXtHKt39soCM8OaSy17swqALuugNorAhpMgWIoB0jyCUnpxyW-LNzatcZP9tXLdg8QEjDzVJ082YBSU0dGwpuueBnSDCBxaMPM5BwsFoD3ABVLtpPeeX3Kp-kpQ_35k70i7hx-udrjfigGX_TW6uQXvTqtFLvidSyjXUu_nnaKj-D4LuqWSk5ab5-T2IEhcyLT1Gg_b88w4FViYn5cUTMV1yZ1krb1N6gLXSdFqVR0PNaGi9ORkUhrt-48A==&c=4eMAjKQzPC_kYTbedUNFlpe1gF8AUs90yRom4AWhn1kU3oxPKBciDw==&ch=JViUzaFeRG7f11dehe3hJFWdqaYE4irRJiYMsfdFJ3Huj37s43xnvA==)

| Dear Friend,
Thank you for signing my petition telling the House Democratic Leadership to stop the impeachment nonsense and get back to the important work they were elected to do.
According to recent reports, a majority of House Democrats, including several members from New York, support impeachment proceedings against President Trump. Judiciary Committee Chairman Jerry Nadler has even confirmed that his committee is conducting "formal impeachment proceedings."
Instead of working on real solutions to the immigration crisis or partnering with the President to invest in our deteriorating infrastructure and create jobs, House Democrats are hellbent on pushing this partisan political agenda--even though it is opposed by the vast majority of the American people. In fact, a recent NBC News/Wall Street Journal poll found that only 1 out of every 5 Americans supports what they're doing.
By putting politics ahead of progress, House Democrats are engaging in partisanship at its worst. As your voice in Congress, I will bring people together to solve the real problems that hardworking families face every day.
Thanks for your support, Nicole
---
| |
---

Peter, I know you are being bombarded with emails right now — but I just wanted to share one last thing [before the deadline closes at midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10438417/104879891/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGNhMDMxNS1lMGUzLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lh9bXSxus2CZ46L9aFPXwUi98okxqH8np_bVoT01Ug8=&refcode=em093019-2&recurring=1) Our democracy is under attack, and we need representatives who will fight back. President Trump and his cronies like McCaul are pulling out all the stops to protect their corrupt regime. It will take someone who has always stood with the people, not corporate donors and big-monied interests. **I have been fighting for the people my whole career.** **I spent seven years in public education working for my students in the classroom and representing my fellow teachers in our union.** When my school district attempted to close thirteen neighborhood schools, I helped bring 1,000 people to a school board meeting, pressured state officials to meet with the community, and helped keep most of those schools open. **I spent ten years in civil rights law.** As a lawyer, I’ve represented workers with abusive bosses, women who faced discrimination, whistleblowers who faced retaliation. As a city attorney for Austin, I led a statewide fight against Senate Bill 4, a hateful anti-immigrant law. **I ran a people’s campaign.** In 2018 we narrowed McCaul’s advantage from 19% to 4%, not with DC consultants and TV ads, but with 1,000 volunteers and a commitment to showing up in every county. We helped protect voting rights for Prairie View A&M students and organized rallies to protest the Family Separation policy. I am committed to continuing this work in 2020 — but we need your help. We are hiring organizers, funding voter registration campaigns, and spreading the word about a toxic coal plant in Fayette County. Every dollar you give today will help us continue this critical work. We are showing that the Democratic Party will stand up for every single person here in Texas. And we are charting the path to victory in 2020. **[Chip in what you can. And please stay engaged. The system is designed to wear us down, but we must keep fighting. name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Senator Ted Cruz Endorses Wesley Hunt in the 7th Congressional District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Today, lifelong conservative Senator Ted Cruz endorsed former Apache helicopter pilot Wesley Hunt in the 7th Congressional District.

Today, lifelong conservative Senator Ted Cruz endorsed former Apache helicopter pilot Wesley Hunt in the 7th Congressional District.
“Wesley who has dedicated his time in military service and volunteer work to protecting our country and improving the Houston area,” said Cruz. “In the race for the Seventh Congressional District in Texas, I am proud to endorse Wesley Hunt”.
“I’m honored to have the endorsement of someone with Senator Cruz’s record of fighting to protect freedom and the Constitution,” said Hunt. “Serving in Baghdad, I saw firsthand what happens to a Nation when it lacks a government based on these principles. In Congress, I’ll work alongside Senator Cruz and others for conservative solutions that benefit people across the 7th District and Texas”

Wesley Hunt is a Houston native, West Point graduate and Apache Helicopter who is running to preserve Houston’s values and way of life.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Here's why this matters to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Winning this race will go a long way toward deciding who controls the Senate--we already know that the other side will line up millions in dark money to do whatever they can to hold on to Cory Gardner | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714ae/691c9bd/6e3b0064/11a79a8a/3648579955/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend--

I'm going to ask you to make a donation in a minute, but first I wanted to zoom out and tell you exactly why all this matters to me.

Tonight's FEC deadline isn't just about the numbers we put up. Our report will give everybody watching our campaign a first look at _how_ we're building this and _who_ is part of it. And there's a lot on the line.

**Winning this race will go a long way toward deciding who controls the Senate** --and we already know that the other side will line up millions in dark money to do whatever they can to hold on to Cory Gardner's seat. We know they have a big head start in terms of money in the bank.

The truth is, we're not going to beat them at that game. The way we win is by building a grassroots operation capable of taking on the super PACs and special interests--and that happens one person at a time.

Our FEC report is the official record of the people who showed up to get this campaign off the ground. So I'm asking personally: [**_Will you chip in before tonight 's deadline and be one of our campaign's founding donors?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190930_JH_20190930-fr-JH-bigpicbump-nop_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190930_JH_20190930-fr-JH-bigpicbump-nop_nop_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714ae/691c9bd/6e3b0064/11a79a86/3648579955/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714ae/691c9bd/6e3b0064/11a79a87/3648579955/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714ae/691c9bd/6e3b0064/11a79a84/3648579955/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714ae/691c9bd/6e3b0064/11a79a85/3648579955/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714ae/691c9bd/6e3b0064/11a79a82/3648579955/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714ae/691c9bd/6e3b0064/11a79a83/3648579955/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714ae/691c9bd/6e3b0064/11a79a86/3648579955/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

| Friend, Wanted to send you this brief update on the latest about Democrats’ attempt to impeach President Trump – here’s the latest:
* Democrats have officially filed to begin investigations into impeachment... all because they’re still devastated that President Trump beat Hillary Clinton.
* Democrats are coordinating with their allies in the media to blow up this new scandal that they invented...because every other line of attack has failed.

I’m calling on my colleagues in Congress to drop impeachment so that we can focus on the issues that matter -- _like completing our border wall and cutting taxes for middle-class families_ – **and I’m prepared to fight back as hard as it takes, so that we can get Congress back to work for the American people.** [**_With our fight just now starting, I need to know I have your full support. name: Cory Booker
subject: no words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, At 4:45 p.m. today, it happened. We officially crossed our $2 million end-of-quarter goal. I was already blown away when you all breezed past our $1.7 million goal with a full day to spare -- but $2 million? I'm truly overwhelmed by the show of support. If there's anything I've learned over the course of this campaign, it's that this team never ceases to amaze me. But like I've said before, I'm not going to ask less of you, but more of you. And I think we can keep this momentum going before the FEC deadline tonight at 11:59 p.m. **If this email raises $32,804 in the next seven hours, we 'll stay on the pathway to our best quarter ever.** **[What do you say, will you help us get there? Donate $5 right now to put us over the top.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190930_CB_20190930-fr-CB-2mil-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I'm really blown away by all of the support we've had so far in what's known to be the worst fundraising quarter of the year. When our FEC report is made public, I want to be able to say this team made sure we put up our best number possible. And with only a few hours to go until our deadline, I think we can. **Here 's a link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190930_CB_20190930-fr-CB-2mil-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** The clock is ticking. name: Jake Fons
subject: Down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Trust me, Jason Lewis and the Republicans are all going to be pouring over our FEC report. We don't want to fall behind, and we're still $36,484 short. Can you help?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190930eoq7-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, this is getting close.

We have less than twelve hours left to go before the FEC deadline.

This is a big one, bigger than any of our other deadlines this year. Because when these reports are made public, we'll have our first look at how we stack up against Jason Lewis.

And trust me, we won't be the only ones watching.

So I went over the numbers, and here's the deal: **We're just $36,484 away from meeting our end-of-quarter goal. I don't want to tell Tina at midnight that we fell short, so we need to close this gap now before it's too late.[We cannot fall behind with Jason Lewis and the GOP watching us. Pitch in $10 right now so we close this gap before midnight.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190930eoq7-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
[DONATE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190930eoq7-full&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

Thanks for your help,

Jake Fons
Finance Director | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190930eoq7-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: Dave Owen, Campaign Chairman
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lindstrom for Senate
body:
I wanted to drop you a quick email to introduce myself, and share my take on Dave Lindstrom, the most qualified candidate for the U.S. Senate. My nam
Peter,
I wanted to drop you a quick email to introduce myself, and share my take on Dave Lindstrom, the most qualified candidate for the U.S. Senate.
My name is Dave Owen, and I serve as the campaign chairman for Dave Lindstrom’s campaign.
I’ve seen my fair share of Kansas Republicans in my career, and seldom has a more experienced and qualified individual run for public office in our great state! I hope that you will join me in seeing Dave as the leader Kansas needs, [**and consider chipping in to help him preserve our conservative values.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=0fc22e754b5e4469a44de7c1bdd1de4e&_e=okU7fvRRg0nBLcJqDNn-vVRl1brURP5tgxCcH1B0GBoeQ6-S4EtqDc5_Fw2t4OXzlX2rjdeWUFGSZ4FZFw8cIIcmSDziIFBk8HrUKplNbhtIBas3P_DqRV6FtNFIs5XDoPImvlmKWHzW0MykBZIel6-OFYzVwXnXbBIv-2zH4mCNRUyO8pX6Y2ZQz5CJtA8gk4FxjQ_UxG8QoNdk2wZDD-Fh9cGzCc2mJwAhPn61tRjy2gp1LWOfkzZo00-7X0s5xD1d5dqN3gY33bpTRNyb8XxEZwglWmJFcTo3w-d4bBfE5Ro_lgg6Pv_E_zZ9MsOPmjYLBkeKxmzLG2SWffyBbAHHsXlIU1cWNtm7VzbDMiORQIQGUeXfVrYRKBIoWy73GMWthNoYd5y5ShgILnf1uu-1ZgNHoTICF5lzrhS_h5LICPHedWfpVoUPsToZG90W)
After eight years of playing defensive-end for the Kansas City Chiefs, Dave was a successful businessman (real estate developer, and owned and operated four Burger Kings), and a committed public servant.
He is currently Chairman of the Kansas Turnpike Authority, Chairman of the Kansas Leadership Center in Wichita, and holds many other active positions in community service.
He has been married to his wife Mary for 40 years, and they have two grown daughters, Halee and Adrienne.
Peter, I’m emailing you today because our country is under attack from the far-Left, and I firmly believe that Dave Lindstrom is the only man capable of standing tall for Kansas amid all the chaos in Washington.
He is a strong conservative. He is smart, tough, and experienced... and he’s up for the task of **SACKING THE LEFT**.
Peter, if you’re serious about defending our Kansas way of life, preserving our values, and sending a principled conservative to Washington, I’m humbly asking for your support.
Our campaign is off to an incredible start, but we’ll need your help to ensure that every voter in Kansas hears our positive message. [**Will you chip in?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=0fc22e754b5e4469a44de7c1bdd1de4e&_e=okU7fvRRg0nBLcJqDNn-vVRl1brURP5tgxCcH1B0GBoeQ6-S4EtqDc5_Fw2t4OXzlX2rjdeWUFGSZ4FZFw8cIIcmSDziIFBk8HrUKplNbhtIBas3P_DqRV6FtNFIs5XDoPImvlmKWHzW0MykBZIel6-OFYzVwXnXbBIv-2zH4mCNRUyO8pX6Y2ZQz5CJtA8gk4FxjQ_UxG8QoNdk2wZDD89zugohZhT3zs8ceRkOG3-jx5WaoCFYlS1qSRRP05gZntCgavuWVXa49t881EycRZFO43DYhztlM0cZl1IT_1nvw0wUVLTBaA1aIAl5HPZkHt0tHvOT0gxrTLPN_V69qYtp5LiGP_XPQBEho1cs3Qoqz_k9pcVpUHRnvsg1s-Jdf2P-8PuS_c9NvwgwwY_QBDfk3DJtHA8v0Y8HrY1xEhdV9-cw4e-9CfUV542L_F8v)
****[STAND WITH DAVE LINDSTROM](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=0fc22e754b5e4469a44de7c1bdd1de4e&_e=okU7fvRRg0nBLcJqDNn-vVRl1brURP5tgxCcH1B0GBoeQ6-S4EtqDc5_Fw2t4OXzlX2rjdeWUFGSZ4FZFw8cIIcmSDziIFBk8HrUKplNbhtIBas3P_DqRV6FtNFIs5XDoPImvlmKWHzW0MykBZIel6-OFYzVwXnXbBIv-2zH4mCNRUyO8pX6Y2ZQz5CJtA8gk4FxjQ_UxG8QoNdk2wZDD5EFr796xuTHn2wSE2GjqKqSwR8CX232e---PbC-GteyMT3e5Rrt-8sLhsOtFv8pS0wOgbgRLi4NsCbLy_ShNakHsINDA1PD9Labb1e8wjgMRhFfXDtp3clpfbpwYXmhdC5SGiWWsWM_uGVdH8kvvY_qxkKYgZIjrUrmTblRQCCCP2ZKRe5LdWkcrG1XChI6J-AK0TbD5ftSXhlZONx_JfDJH5j6wEiyTL2kTwk1HEYM)****

****[DEFEND OUR VALUES](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=0fc22e754b5e4469a44de7c1bdd1de4e&_e=okU7fvRRg0nBLcJqDNn-vVRl1brURP5tgxCcH1B0GBoeQ6-S4EtqDc5_Fw2t4OXzlX2rjdeWUFGSZ4FZFw8cIIcmSDziIFBk8HrUKplNbhtIBas3P_DqRV6FtNFIs5XDoPImvlmKWHzW0MykBZIel6-OFYzVwXnXbBIv-2zH4mCNRUyO8pX6Y2ZQz5CJtA8gk4FxjQ_UxG8QoNdk2wZDDzyDVfrIcx8QyuBZJ33N8mHIHT2BptxaLZ4bYGIFVK5oEPgaFsAgZz3tYmUK5esPrKr0YduIz6F1B0hiCWY3W_gw4nJUpItP94TkDHL7-6hXbJCscEdzcu1w46--5SGE3bCqKl45GnufRloOgCoYv_LkuqK70T568OXfC4RcX8k6lPkhHgDHCXbcwQRbsWFJ71C07APHz6HvRCOdMkBg4tpkT2e9hdLN3TqTjtcUuB9-)****
---
****[CHIP IN](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=0fc22e754b5e4469a44de7c1bdd1de4e&_e=okU7fvRRg0nBLcJqDNn-vVRl1brURP5tgxCcH1B0GBoeQ6-S4EtqDc5_Fw2t4OXzlX2rjdeWUFGSZ4FZFw8cIIcmSDziIFBk8HrUKplNbhtIBas3P_DqRV6FtNFIs5XDoPImvlmKWHzW0MykBZIel6-OFYzVwXnXbBIv-2zH4mCNRUyO8pX6Y2ZQz5CJtA8gk4FxjQ_UxG8QoNdk2wZDD-vlFDBgcZAYsPxMWm7DDjm0kohDINI0XZM1wTQalv9LPq814Kj3FCP84IcoFYw1kH0VXMgAqyXiHNPEjjPNhrOTnIQ5Zc_sGu51e0UManS_Zxpk5zwWtaupws5P1inCewkaqC_H_PFsMzIxbTHoYIk8a6EsnTQNKvexUETWZoq3XP8ly0HnI6i-KRocYjfrKTk-ZkCvlVCRENxsEHyWmFVeNqc0rr9jPOqKq7UXMCvL)****

We would value and appreciate YOUR support!

Dave Owen
Campaign Chairman, Lindstrom for Senate
[#SacktheLeft](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=0fc22e754b5e4469a44de7c1bdd1de4e&_e=okU7fvRRg0nBLcJqDNn-vUgcpegDoP9tKawGF1cobLFl96xNlhSbX4KQvS6A6OxStvCIZ8H2sG-Z4ptUBKO8jjo5-5zNn4Rg6Mb6FkL5W0WFGwc-CBY-9NzPxtmbz7SI_C_7suCyHtBxBXyn3QFSbqrR70R0NGZbUUtpbQNbsNFutLPEyp1MIMsNCS60kZHWFdGxyk2uetPx7r1MyeilryVfdbUqPnva2tbOf5gs5ZPtp-JbTBPf8D7OzRL7c2Hx7ZaQjsLvMAh0s0cpsV-cYuwJXutgd2T-iTg8ADvBDTNKjhSVLLfpvkDhAB1f0d6tobpfL4x4ou0UVFZORQVbDQ%3D%3D)TM

subject: We haven’t qualified for the November debate yet

body:

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1218%2E377263%2EVNLAjX) Hey Yang Gang --

We still haven’t qualified for the November DNC debate. **To do that -- we need to hit our stretch goal of $2 million and there are only 8 hours left.[Can you rush a contribution right now?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12428?t=5&akid=1218%2E377263%2EVNLAjX)**

Qualifying for these debates is critical to our path to victory. We need every ounce of time in front of a national audience of Democrats if we’re going to win and take on the establishment candidates with higher name recognition.

name: Steve Beshear
subject: Beyond a shadow of a doubt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Let me start off by saying that being governor of Kentucky isn't easy. My years in office were some of the most rewarding -- but also most challenging -- of my life.
|
---

| | Peter --

Let me start off by saying that being governor of Kentucky isn't easy. I know! My years in office were some of the most rewarding -- but also most challenging -- of my life. It's a tremendous responsibility, with millions of people counting on you every day to make the right decisions.

So as much as I love my son Andy, I wouldn't endorse him for governor if I didn't know _beyond a shadow of a doubt_ that **Andy has what it takes to do an outstanding job and make a positive difference in the lives of Kentuckians.**

But to win, he needs your help _today_. **With just ONE MONTH until the election, he needs to meet his $35,000 end-of-month goal to keep the momentum going.** The great news: **a generous group of supporters is MATCHING all donations that come in by midnight.**

**Will you chip in today to help the campaign get to $35,000 and win this for Kentucky?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a34/ad6dc73/140a078c/db7b00a/3579006967/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwOCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20190930.2nd__308__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a34/ad6dc73/140a078c/db7b00b/3579006967/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwOCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20190930.2nd__308__&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a34/ad6dc73/140a078c/db7b008/3579006967/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwOCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20190930.2nd__308__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a34/ad6dc73/140a078c/db7b009/3579006967/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwOCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20190930.2nd__308__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a34/ad6dc73/140a078c/db7b00e/3579006967/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwOCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20190930.2nd__308__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a34/ad6dc73/140a078c/db7b00f/3579006967/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwOCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septeom?refcode=20190930.2nd__308__")** I couldn't be prouder of the campaign Andy's run along with his running mate Jacqueline. They genuinely care about the people of Kentucky. And they've gone the extra mile -- or "miles" in this case -- traveling across the Commonwealth, meeting with hardworking people and sharing their plans to build the Kentucky we all know is possible -- with world-class schools, more good-paying jobs and affordable health care for everyone.

**[I hope you'll pitch in today to get Andy to his $35,000 goal.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a34/ad6dc73/140a078c/db7b00c/3579006967/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwOCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septeom?refcode=20190930.2nd__308__&amount=5")** And don't forget -- today's the last day that your donation will be matched dollar for dollar, so don't wait.

Thanks so much,

Steve Beshear | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a34/ad6dc73/140a078c/db7b00c/3579006967/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwOCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septeom?refcode=20190930.2nd__308__&amount=5")**

subject: This is what's at stake:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cc55/6cd27893/526724c7/15873f0f/358120994/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")

name: Team Stephanie
subject: It's last call: Please chip in whatever you can afford before the clock strikes midnight and we close our books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
We're really close to reaching our goal, and this is your final chance to help us get there.
|
---

| | friends, Tick. Tick. Tick. Tick. That's the sound of the clock flying toward midnight -- and when it does, we need to close the books on our first-ever FEC fundraising deadline. We're really close to reaching our goal, and this is your final chance to help us get there. [**Can you make a contribution before midnight?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f343213/2066938685/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=20190930_em_nd_pm") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[CHIP IN: $10](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f343212/2066938685/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20190930_em_nd_pm_abx_10")**
---
**[CHIP IN: $25](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f343211/2066938685/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20190930_em_nd_pm_abx_25")**
---
**[CHIP IN: $50](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f343210/2066938685/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20190930_em_nd_pm_abx_50")**
---
**[CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f34320f/2066938685/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=20190930_em_nd_pm_abx_other")**
---
Thank you for helping us get the job done,
Team Stephanie

\----------- Forwarded message -----------
From: Stephanie Schmid
Date: September 30, 2019
Re: I'm asking you personally

friends,
Today's September 30 -- the final day of the quarter. So, here are a few things I want to let you know about tonight's public fundraising deadline:
* **It's the most important moment of our campaign to date.** Once this deadline is over, we have to publicly report what we raise.
* **There are a LOT of competitive House races in New Jersey right now.** We can't risk falling short of this goal and losing the attention of Democrats across New Jersey.
* **I really believe in our team.** If you chip in right now, we're going to succeed.

**[I'm asking personally: Can you please add your donation, of whatever you can afford, before tonight's FEC deadline? This is such an important moment for us.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f34320e/2066938685/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=20190930_em_pm_nd")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[CHIP IN: $10](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f343212/2066938685/VEsB/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20190930_em_nd_pm_abx_10")**
---
**[CHIP IN: $25](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f343211/2066938685/VEsO/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20190930_em_nd_pm_abx_25")**
---
**[CHIP IN: $50](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f343210/2066938685/VEsP/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20190930_em_nd_pm_abx_50")**
---
**[CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f34320f/2066938685/VEsHBQ/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=20190930_em_nd_pm_abx_other")**
---
I'm running for Congress because I believe that America is at its best when we open up our hearts. When we protect human rights, here and abroad. When we protect women, and girls, and our LGTBQ+ friends. When we live up to the promise of a more perfect union. When we stand up and defend our Constitution.
But politicians like Donald Trump and Chris Smith are different. They want to divide us rather than unite us. Their values simply don't align with the values that you and I share.
So that's why I'm asking for your help today. **I can promise you that I will fight every single day for you and for families across this district -- but to do it, we need to send that blue wave crashing down on the Jersey Shore.**
**[Can you please contribute what you can before midnight? Whatever you can give, I promise, it WILL make a difference.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f34320e/2066938685/VEsHBA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=20190930_em_pm_nd")**
Thanks for standing with me.
\-- Stephanie
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b4/522d4087/7afdfa8e/4f34320d/2066938685/VEsHBw/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe") at any time._

subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Angela Underwood Jacobs for Congress
body:
Only a few hours left to contribute toward our fundraising deadline! | | | [ ](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=4fe6524073&e=ec66c3b29a)
---
| | **I need your help!**
_I need your help_ now more than ever. This quarter's filing deadline is **only hours** away - can you pitch in just [$5, $10, $25, $50, $75, $100](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=57148d0e5b&e=ec66c3b29a) or more if you can to help bring Republican leadership back to CA-25? Each donation will go directly toward my goal of beating Nancy Pelosi and Katie Hill in 2020.

In case you missed it, **Katie Hill** officially came out in support of an impeachment inquiry into President Trump. This deadline is _especially important_ to show Rep. Hill that a divisive impeachment hearing isn't good for our country.
[Click to donate ASAP!](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=e17f199555&e=ec66c3b29a)
Our race is a key part of taking back the House in 2020. We're building a strong grassroots team, but we need _EVERY Republican_ on board to defeat national Democrats and Katie Hill's reckless "progressive" agenda.
Our district needs a voice in Congress that is focused on the things that **impact our community every day** , not on the political circus currently going on in Washington.
---
| [Rush your donation now ->>](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=095266d185&e=ec66c3b29a "Rush your donation now ->>")
---
| We need to take** immediate action** to bring commonsense conservative leadership back to the 25th District, and to fight Katie Hill and her million-dollar campaign war chest. I hope you will consider joining our team!
---
| All the best,

[](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=a66855a972&e=ec66c3b29a)

**About Angela Underwood Jacobs:**

Underwood Jacobs currently serves as the regional Senior Vice President of California Bank and Trust, where she helps Californians live their _American Dream_ – purchase their first home, receive a loan to launch a small business, or save for retirement. Underwood Jacobs was the first African American woman elected to the Lancaster City Council, where she has served since 2015. She is the proud wife of a military veteran and a mother that has lived in Antelope Valley for over 25 years.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: I can't believe what I'm seeing
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I'm floored.

I was worried we wouldn't meet our end-of-quarter goal for the first time in my entire campaign.

I was worried Trump's New Mexico rally meant the end of our fight to flip the Senate.

**_But my team just told me we're about to have one of the biggest fundraising comebacks of our entire campaign!_**

[**_I only need 1 more gift from 18326 before my midnight end-of-quarter deadline to meet my goal, WIN my race, and DEFEAT McConnell's Republican Senate. Will you be the gift that puts me over the top? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b4_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

I know it was grassroots supporters like you who helped me take back the House last year.

**And in moments like these, I'm reminded just how powerful your support is.**

You know what's at stake with another two years of Mitch McConnell. You know the only way forward is to take back the Senate.

I'm so grateful for you and the historic comeback you're about to make happen for my critical Senate race. I hope I can count on your $5 before midnight: | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b4_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b4_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b4_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b4_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")******
---

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190930_em_fr_b4_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---
Thank you,

Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b48a/18e32a7f/536f620d/7b0c2db0/315352629/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b48a/18e32a7f/536f620d/7b0c2db1/315352629/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b48a/18e32a7f/536f620d/7b0c2db6/315352629/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b48a/18e32a7f/536f620d/7b0c2db7/315352629/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b48a/18e32a7f/536f620d/7b0c2db4/315352629/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b48a/18e32a7f/536f620d/7b0c2db5/315352629/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

We’re getting **_so close_** to our end-of-quarter goal here, and when we meet with the Governor tomorrow we want to be able to give him the good news that you, his supporters, have come through once again. With what's going on in Washington DC over the past week, it's never been more important. [**Can you raise your hand right now to help us get to $50,000 by midnight tonight?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCF67jnlb3VBHTQSDvsh5IIc&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190930_2s&n=2) | | [RAISE YOUR HAND ⇒](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCF67jnlb3VBHTQSDvsh5IIc&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190930_2s&n=3)

Team Weld

We’re taking the country by storm, and at the end of the day, if we can inspire hope in Americans across the country that they deserve better leadership in Washington, then I would consider this a huge success.
Now, that being said — midnight tonight is our FEC deadline. Once we close the books on Q3 our fundraising numbers become public. Can you help us inspire hope by making a small contribution to our campaign?
You can use this link right here: [**CLICK HERE**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCF67jnlb3VBHTQSDvsh5IIc&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190930_2s&n=4)
— Bill

| **It's "Movie Night" on Dancing with the Stars!

Voting opens tonight at 8p ET/5p PT. I'm scheduled to dance last tonight, but do not wait to vote!**
---
| | **_How to vote:_**

You can submit 20 votes total for Sean and Lindsay.

You can submit 10 votes by texting SEAN to 21523. Each text is one vote, you have to send SEAN 10 times to submit all 10 votes.

You can submit 10 additional votes online at [ABC.com](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=648dcd7b70&e=f6564bbe3b). You need to start by making an account [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=492c50a6ee&e=f6564bbe3b) (which you can do now before voting opens). When voting begins you login and can add 10 votes for Sean and Lindsay, #TeamSweetandSpicey.

All the information on making an ABC account and other FAQs are [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=19291f6af3&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| I'm very humbled by all the support I received last week and hope I can keep dancing, but I can't do it without all of your votes.

Thanks,

_Sean_
